Introduction
    Young Mosquito goes about her daily life in the post-apocalyptic wastelands of 2084. Suddenly she finds herself teleported into the present day, where eccentric scientist Albert has just tested his new invention on her: the Timeot...

Filming locations: La Palma, Tenerife, Canary Islands, Spain
